- Recover from Injury: |>10|?L|Once the immigrants began arriving, Bato became swept up in the rebuilding effort. {LF}{LF} He always preferred routine labour to combat, so he eventually signed on with a group of people heading out to set up a camp in the lower Knightwood region.{LF}{LF}The last you heard from him, he is still there, building homes for new immigrants and keeping himself quite busy.{LF}{LF}
- 怪我からの回復: |>10|?L|移民开始涌入后，巴托也被卷入了重建浪潮。{LF}{LF}他向来更喜欢日常劳作而非战斗，最终加入了一支前往骑士林下游建立营地的队伍。{LF}{LF}你最后得到的消息是，他仍在那里为新移民建造房屋，忙得不可开交。{LF}{LF}

- Recover from Injury: |>10|?L|Bato, a small man even by human standards, had difficulty finding work in a nation already oversaturated with strong orcish labourers.{LF}{LF}He eventually found a labour commune that was willing to take him in, and he worked hard to earn his keep, but found it more difficult to earn the respect of his peers.{LF}{LF}He frequently suffered abuse of all sorts at their hands, and eventually, he left, choosing a solitary life over the constant ridicule.{LF}{LF}You have not heard from him since.
- 怪我からの回復: |>10|?L|即便以人类标准来看也身材矮小的巴托，在早已充斥强壮兽人劳工的国度里谋生艰难。{LF}{LF}他最终找到个愿意收留他的劳动公社，拼命干活挣口饭吃，却发现更难赢得同伴的尊重。{LF}{LF}他屡遭他们各种欺辱，最终选择离开，宁愿孤身一人也不愿忍受无休止的嘲弄。{LF}{LF}此后便再无他的音讯。

- Recover from Injury: |>11|?L|Bato was excited about the rebuilding of the island before the conquest of it was even completed.{LF}{LF}For a while, he regularly came to you with revision upon revision for a plan to renovate the capital city of old Lukatt, and when you finally had the whole of the island under your control and gave him the go-ahead, he actually wept openly.{LF}{LF}With his efforts, the capital became a respectable seat for your new nation, and Bato now handles the rebuilding efforts in an official capacity, managing the shipments of supplies, brokering trade deals, and negotiating with foreign guilds for material and labour.{LF}{LF}He remains stalwart, reliable, and your close friend.
- 怪我からの回復: |>11|?L|还没等全岛征服完成，巴托就对重建计划兴奋不已。{LF}{LF}有段时间他频繁找你，反复修改旧卢卡特首都的重建方案，当你终于掌控全岛并批准他动工时，他竟当众潸然泪下。{LF}{LF}在他的努力下，首都成了新国家像样的行政中心，如今巴托以官方身份负责重建，管理物资运输，斡旋贸易协议，与外国行会洽谈物资人力。{LF}{LF}他始终坚定可靠，仍是你的挚友。

- Recover from Injury: |>11|?L|Bato, a devoted friend to the very core, was always close at hand once you arrived in Tsarath.{LF}{LF}Though he sometimes bordered on overbearing, he always put on a bright face and kept after you to take care of yourself, and having him nearby made the transition into your new life easier.{LF}{LF}He made a point of helping out with repairs, construction, and hunting in your new home whenever an opportunity arose, and eventually attracted the attention of a few bright-eyed young orcs who follow him around like lost pups.{LF}{LF}He managed to shape them up into a freelance labour crew, and seems happy to be at the center of their attention.
- 怪我からの回復: |>11|?L|忠心不二的巴托自你抵达沙拉斯后常伴左右。{LF}{LF}虽有时近乎专横，但他总展露爽朗笑容督促你照顾好自己，有他在旁让你更快适应新生活。{LF}{LF}他总抓住机会帮你修缮房屋、建造猎舍，渐渐吸引了几名目光炯炯的年轻兽人，像迷途幼犬般追随他。{LF}{LF}他将他们培养成自由劳工队，似乎很享受成为众人焦点的感觉。

- Recover from Injury: |>13|?L|Beauregard was particularly overwhelmed by all of the changes sweeping over the island. {LF}{LF}When word got out that he was a survivor from old Lukatt, and that he was several hundred years old, he began to be harassed by people calling themselves historians; people who didn't like the way their accounts of Lukatt's history differed from his, and one day he simply disappeared.{LF}{LF}His whereabouts are unknown.
- 怪我からの回復: |>13|?L|博雷加德尤其被席卷全岛的剧变压得喘不过气。{LF}{LF}当他是旧卢卡特幸存者且活了几百岁的消息传开后，自称历史学家的人开始骚扰他——这些人不满其历史记载与他所述相悖，某天他突然销声匿迹。{LF}{LF}至今下落不明。

- Recover from Injury: |>13|?L|Though he helped with building the boat, Beauregard was unwilling to leave behind the only home he had ever known, and he did not make the journey to Tsarath with you.{LF}{LF}He remained on Lukatt and moved into Spartill Lodge, one of the few remaining familiar places to him, and is presumably still there, making a place for himself among the people who still dwell on the island.{LF}{LF}
- 怪我からの回復: |>13|?L|尽管协助造船，博雷加德却不愿离开唯一的故乡，未随你同往沙拉斯。{LF}{LF}他留在卢卡特，迁入斯帕提尔 Lodge——少数尚存的熟悉之地，想必仍在岛上居民中寻找自己的位置。{LF}{LF}

- Recover from Injury: |>14|?L|Beauregard was particularly overwhelmed by all of the changes sweeping over the island, and often came to you for advice and guidance.{LF}{LF}Knowing that he was once a military officer, you appointed him as a general in charge of rebuilding new Lukatt's military.{LF}{LF}At first, he was shocked, but he didn't want to disappoint you, and having a familiar responsibility to focus on seemed to give him some purpose. He eventually began to shed his doubts and find his feet once more.{LF}{LF}Now, General Beauregard lives at Spartill Lodge, but he is often at your side and at your table, advising you on military and tactical matters, and offering you and the new nation the same support you once offered him.
- 怪我からの回復: |>14|?L|博雷加德被岛上的翻天覆地压得透不过气，常来向你寻求指引。{LF}{LF}得知他曾任军官，你任命他为将军负责新卢卡特军队重建。{LF}{LF}起初他震惊不已，但不愿辜负你，而熟悉的职责让他重拾目标，逐渐摆脱疑虑站稳脚跟。{LF}{LF}如今博雷加德将军驻守斯帕提尔 Lodge，却常伴你左右参与议政，就军事战术献计，为你与新国家提供你曾给予他的同等支持。

- Recover from Injury: |>14|?L|Seeing his whole world in shambles was painful for him, so convincing Beauregard to come to Tsarath with you was not difficult. He had even been there once before, hundreds of years past, and seemed eager to see their progress.{LF}{LF}He eventually found himself a place in one of the many Tsarathi military schools, where spending his time training and parenting the young orc boys seemed to soothe his confusion, and his mood lightened considerably in the years that followed.{LF}{LF}He never had a chance at marrying, but surrounded as he is by his adopted nephews, his life is a happy one.
- 怪我からの回復: |>14|?L|眼看着他整个世界的崩塌，对他来说是痛苦的，所以说服博雷加德和你一起去查拉斯并不难。他几百年前曾去过那里一次，似乎很渴望看到他们的发展。{LF}{LF}最终，他在查拉斯的众多军事学院之一找到了自己的位置。在那里，他把时间花在训练和抚养年轻的兽人男孩上，这似乎抚平了他的困惑，在接下来的几年里，他的心情也大大好转了。{LF}{LF}他从未有机会结婚，但被收养的侄子们包围着，他的生活是幸福的。

- Recover from Injury: |>16|?L|When your band began work on the boat, Borfalgor, unsure of your destination or your motivations, disappeared one night and did not return.{LF}{LF}Presumably, he has returned to whatever it was he was doing before you found him, living his life on the island where he was born.
- 怪我からの回復: |>16|?L|当你的团队开始造船时，博尔法尔格，因为不确定你的目的地或动机，在某天晚上消失了，再也没回来。{LF}{LF}很可能，他已经回到了你找到他之前所做的事情上，在他出生的岛屿上生活。

- Recover from Injury: |>16|?L|Borfalgor disappeared when the first boat of immigrants arrived.{LF}{LF}Though it's possible that he simply retreated to watch the island's progress from a distance, you have heard some reports that he stowed away on the ship as it returned to the mainland.{LF}{LF}You can't be certain, but he is probably exploring on his own, seeing more sights than any goblin ever has before.
- 怪我からの回復: |>16|?L|第一批移民船抵达时，博尔法尔格消失了。{LF}{LF}虽然有可能他只是退到远处观察岛屿的发展，但你听到一些报告说，他在船返回大陆时偷偷溜了上去。{LF}{LF}你无法确定，但他很可能正在独自探索，看到的风景比任何地精都多。

- Recover from Injury: |>17|?L|When it became obvious that marauding goblin tribes were a threat to the burgeoning civilization, Borfalgor offered to head the effort to get them under control. He seemed convinced that they could be confined to their own lands without exterminating them, and wanted to try.{LF}{LF}The effort, however, did not go well, and he has since given up on trying to bridge the gap between the goblins and the rest of civilization.{LF}{LF}He currently wanders the island, sending you regular reports regarding monster populations and rebuilding progress. He promises to return soon, once he feels like he has a proper grasp on his place in the world.
- 怪我からの回復: |>17|?L|当掠夺的地精部落对新兴文明构成威胁变得明显时，博尔法尔格主动提出领导控制他们的行动。他似乎深信可以在不灭绝他们的情况下将他们限制在自己的土地上，并想尝试一下。{LF}{LF}然而，这项行动进行得并不顺利，他自此放弃了弥合地精与其他文明之间鸿沟的尝试。{LF}{LF}他目前在该岛上游荡，定期向你报告怪物种群和重建进度。他承诺，一旦他觉得自己真正找到了在这个世界上的位置，就会很快回来。

- Recover from Injury: |>17|?L|Borfalgor was eager to see the world outside of Lukatt, and made the journey to Tsarath with you, unafraid of the consequences.{LF}{LF}Though his reception in Tsarath was not exactly warm, he was for the most part tolerated.{LF}{LF}One day in the marketplace, thanks to his keen eye for jewelry, he spotted a trader selling fake stones and managed to very publicly prove the man's fraud. He was approached by a merchant and offered an ongoing job overseeing and appraising valuables.{LF}{LF}He draws a lot of business to the shop on his novelty alone, and he gets to see an endless parade of priceless treasures brought before him, all without having to leave his lavish accomodations, and he seems happy with the place he has found himself.
- 怪我からの回復: |>17|?L|博尔法尔格渴望看到卢卡特以外的世界，不顾后果地与你一同前往查拉斯。{LF}{LF}虽然他在查拉斯受到的接待并不十分热情，但大体上还是被容忍了。{LF}{LF}有一天在市场上，凭借他对珠宝的敏锐眼光，他发现一个商人在卖假宝石，并成功地在公众面前揭穿了那人的骗局。一位商人找到他，提供了一份长期工作，负责监督和评估贵重物品。{LF}{LF}仅凭他的新奇身份，他就为商店招揽了大量生意，而且无需离开他奢华的住所，就能看到无数无价之宝呈现在他面前，他似乎对自己找到的这个位置很满意。

- Recover from Injury: |>19|?L|Though Borgnina generally approved of the changes made on the island, she was always more than a little wary about your encounter with Leviathan.{LF}{LF}She never asked you about it directly, but you frequently got the sense that she was unhappy, and one day she told you that her pilgrimage was over, and that she was leaving.{LF}{LF}”Be careful,” she warned as she turned to leave for the last time. ”Remember what happened to Glamig. Don't follow her.”{LF}{LF}Then she was gone, and you have not seen her again.
- 怪我からの回復: |>19|?L|尽管博尔尼娜大体上赞同岛上发生的变化，但她对你与利维坦的遭遇始终抱有不止一点点的警惕。{LF}{LF}她从未直接向你询问过此事，但你常常感觉到她不开心，有一天她告诉你，她的朝圣之旅结束了，她要离开了。{LF}{LF}“小心点，”她最后一次转身离开时警告道。“记住格拉米格身上发生了什么。别步她的后尘。”{LF}{LF}然后她就走了，你再也没有见过她。

- Recover from Injury: |>19|?L|Since she had come to Lukatt voluntarily, when you arrived in Tsarath, Borgnina immediately began to make arrangements for transport on another ship bound for Crest.{LF}{LF}She returned to her previous community in order to announce the success of her pilgrimage, but then quickly requested transfer to another hamlet, where she has settled back into old patterns, serving as an agent of law and faith.
- 怪我からの回復: |>19|?L|由于她是自愿来到卢卡特的，当你抵达查拉斯时，博尔尼娜立即开始安排搭乘另一艘前往克雷斯特的船。{LF}{LF}她回到之前的社区宣布她朝圣的成功，但很快请求调往另一个村庄，在那里她重新融入了旧有的模式，担任法律与信仰的执行者。

- Recover from Injury: |>20|?L|Borgnina seemed to only grow more confident as time passed, devoting herself entirely to shepherding the soul of the new nation rising up around her.{LF}{LF}Because she was never actually reprimanded or excommunicated from her old order, the completion of her seemingly impossible pilgrimage became widely regarded as a divine miracle, and she was soon granted station enough to outrank the men who once tried to drive her to ruin.{LF}{LF}Under her gentle guidance, a chapter of crusaders was established on the island, and they made it their personal quest to rediscover and rebuild shrines of worship across the land.{LF}{LF}When he speaks to you, Leviathan tells you that he hears your people whisper their thanks to him far and wide, and he seems pleased by this.
- 怪我からの回復: |>20|?L|随着时间的推移，博尔尼娜似乎只是变得更加自信，全身心地投入到引导她周围崛起的新国家的灵魂之中。{LF}{LF}因为她实际上从未受到旧教团的训斥或驱逐，她完成那看似不可能的朝圣之旅被广泛视为神圣的奇迹，她很快被授予了足以超越那些曾试图逼她走向毁灭的男人们的地位。{LF}{LF}在她温和的指导下，岛上建立了一个圣战者分部，他们将重新发现和重建遍布各地的崇拜圣地作为个人的使命。{LF}{LF}利维坦与你交谈时告诉你，他听到你的人民在四处低声感谢他，他似乎对此感到高兴。

- Recover from Injury: |>20|?L|Borgnina threw away her raiments before the boat landed in Tsarath. Though her faith in her God was shaken, her faith in her order had been long since exhausted, and she no longer wished to identify with them.{LF}{LF}Instead, she took it upon herself to exemplify her faith personally, and live her life more freely than she had before.{LF}{LF}She took a home in a slum by choice, and tried her best to be an uplifting influence to the downtrodden people who surround her, and after a few years, she even married a strong orc who adored her adamant spirit.{LF}{LF}Life for Borgnina is not how she imagined it, but she claims she has no regrets.
- 怪我からの回復: |>20|?L|在船抵达察拉斯之前，博尔吉娜就丢弃了她的教袍。尽管她对神的信仰已然动摇，但她对所属教团的信念早已消耗殆尽，不再希望与他们有任何关联。{LF}{LF}取而代之的是，她决心亲自践行自己的信仰，活得比以往更加自由。{LF}{LF}她选择在贫民窟安家，尽力为身边受压迫的人们带来积极的影响。几年后，她甚至与一位仰慕她坚韧精神的强壮兽人结了婚。{LF}{LF}博尔吉娜的生活并非她曾经想象的模样，但她声称自己并无悔意。

- Recover from Injury: |>22|?L|Byrne stayed close to you after things on the island began to move quickly, seemingly afraid that he would be caught up in the purge of monsters. {LF}{LF}Though you reassured him of his safety repeatedly, he grew more and more paranoid, sequestering himself away for days on end.{LF}{LF}Eventually, due to his irregular feeding, he went berzerk and attacked some travelers. By the time you heard about it, he had already been hunted down and killed by a vigilante adventurer.{LF}{LF}This has, of course, done little to improve the opinion of the populace regarding vampires, and reports of them on the island are becoming more and more scarce.
- 怪我からの回復: |>22|?L|岛上局势开始急转直下后，伯恩因为害怕被卷入针对怪物的肃清行动，一直紧跟着你。{LF}{LF}尽管你一再向他保证他的安全，他却变得越来越偏执，连续多日把自己关起来不见人。{LF}{LF}最终，由于不规律的进食，他狂暴失控，袭击了一些旅人。等你听闻此事时，他早已被一名自警团的冒险者追捕并杀死了。{LF}{LF}这当然无助于改善民众对吸血鬼的看法，岛上关于他们的目击报告也变得越来越稀少。

- Recover from Injury: |>23|?L|Despite the danger, Byrne came with you on the boat to Tsarath, eager to leave the memory of his time with Frico behind him.{LF}{LF}Wrapped in white robes, he hid in a leper colony where he thought nobody would look for a vampire, and he was so shocked by the understanding welcome he was given, he decided to make his permanent home there.{LF}{LF}He subsists on the blood of wildlife and of grateful volunteers, and he serves quietly as the colony's protector and their connection to the outside world.
- 怪我からの回復: |>23|?L|尽管危险重重，伯恩还是随你一同乘船来到了察拉斯，渴望将与弗利科共度的记忆抛在身后。{LF}{LF}他身裹白袍，藏身于一个麻风病人聚居地，以为没人会去那里搜寻吸血鬼。令他震惊的是，他受到了充满理解的欢迎，于是他决定将那里作为自己永久的家园。{LF}{LF}他依靠野生动物和心怀感激的志愿者的血液维生，默默担任着聚居地的保护者以及他们与外界联系的桥梁。

- Recover from Injury: |>23|?L|Byrne seemed unsure of himself after the island's conquest was completed, afraid of his hunger and afraid that a purge of dangerous monsters might include him.{LF}{LF}In order to assuage his fears, you appointed Byrne as a dignitary, to be your point of contact with any communities of cooperative monsters still remaining on the island, and found him a personal cook who would be unafraid to get creative with including blood in the food.{LF}{LF}He immediately took to both, and now spends his days traveling the island with his entourage, swaddled in finery, and brokering alliances and contracts with those people less inclined to the light of day.{LF}{LF}He remains your friend, still reporting to you and frequently attending your events, and perhaps ironically, looking more the part of a vampire lord than ever before.
- 怪我からの回復: |>23|?L|岛屿的征服完成后，伯恩似乎对自己失去了信心，既害怕自己的饥渴，也担心针对危险怪物的肃清行动会波及自己。{LF}{LF}为了消除他的恐惧，你任命伯恩为使节，负责与岛上残存的、愿意合作的怪物社群联络，并为他找了一位不介意在食物中“别出心裁”地加入血液的私人厨师。{LF}{LF}他立刻对这两项安排都得心应手，如今终日与他的随从们一道，身着华服巡游岛屿，与那些不那么喜欢阳光的人们缔结联盟与契约。{LF}{LF}他依然是你的朋友，继续向你汇报并经常出席你的活动。或许颇具讽刺意味的是，他如今比以往任何时候都更像一位吸血鬼领主。

- Recover from Injury: |>25|?L|After arriving in Tsarath, Logus contacted a few people who had heard of him, and managed to get signed on with a privateering crew as a ship's mate.{LF}{LF}He wasn't thrilled about having to take orders from someone else, but given the choice, he decided that it was more worth it to be out on the water than not, and as far as you know, he is still with that crew, running odd shipments for merchant houses.
- 怪我からの回復: |>25|?L|抵达察拉斯后，洛格斯联系了几个听说过他的人，并成功签约成为一艘私掠船的大副。{LF}{LF}他对于要听命于人并不热衷，但权衡之下，他认为能够出海还是比待在岸上更有价值。据你所知，他至今仍在那支船队，为各家商行运送些稀奇古怪的货物。

- Recover from Injury: |>25|?L|With the seas calm once more, Logus was eager to return to the water. {LF}{LF}You appointed him Captain of one of the ships you seized from the Crest attacks, and he has been working supply lanes to Tsarath ever since.{LF}{LF}Although you still do not know him very well, he makes an effort to check in with you at the capital every so often, and he seems happy to have a crew of his own once again.
- 怪我からの回復: |>25|?L|随着海面重归平静，洛格斯渴望重返大海。{LF}{LF}你任命他为一艘从克雷斯特袭击中缴获的船只的船长，自此他便一直负责通往察拉斯的补给航线。{LF}{LF}虽然你对他仍不算十分了解，但他会时不时地尽力在首都与你联络，而且似乎对于能再次拥有自己的船员感到非常高兴。

- Recover from Injury: |>26|?L|Logus stuck close to you when you arrived in Tsarath. He still had sympathetic contacts there, so he managed to find you shelter and work early on, and generally made the transition to your new surroundings much more agreeable.{LF}{LF}After a time, he began to feel the call of the sea once again, so he pulled some strings and eventually got put in charge of another ship working for a private merchant corps.{LF}{LF}He still tries to stay in touch with you when he can, but he is happy to be back in his element.
- 怪我からの回復: |>26|?L|当你抵达察拉斯时，洛格斯一直陪伴在你左右。他在那里仍有同情他的人脉，因此早早为你找到了栖身之所和工作，总体上让你们适应新环境的过程顺利了许多。{LF}{LF}过了一段时间，他再次听到了大海的召唤，于是动用关系，最终受命掌管另一艘为私人商船队服务的船只。{LF}{LF}他仍会在可能时尽量与你保持联系，但能回到自己如鱼得水的环境，他感到十分开心。

- Recover from Injury: |>26|?L|Logus was anxious to get back out to the water once he knew it would be safe, but he seemed reluctant to just abandon you to the island. Seeing an opportunity for a compromise, you appointed him Admiral of Lukatt's navy.{LF}{LF}He tearfully and graciously accepted the offer, and worked hard to oversee the rebuilding of just such a navy.{LF}{LF}He spends more time in port than at sea, but he makes a point of captaining each new ship's maiden voyage and reporting to you in person on just how well the efforts are going.{LF}{LF}Admiral Logus remains a wise, available advisor, and a good friend.
- 怪我からの回復: |>26|?L|洛格斯一得知安全就急着想回海上，但似乎又不忍心把你一个人丢在岛上。你瞅准机会提出折中方案，任命他为卢卡特海军上将。{LF}{LF}他热泪盈眶地接受了任命，尽心尽力监督海军重建工作。{LF}{LF}他待在港口的时间比出海还多，但坚持亲自指挥每艘新船的处女航，并当面向你汇报进展。{LF}{LF}洛格斯上将始终是位睿智可靠的顾问，更是你的挚友。

- Recover from Injury: |>28|?R|As your conquest of the island became inevitable, Grant returned to Hayill, and eventually became your point of contact with the Lycanthropes who made their home there.{LF}{LF}You still see him on occasion, mostly when it is time to discuss relations or policy, and he acts the same as he ever did, approaching his duty with a hard-swallowed stoicism.{LF}{LF}Hayill eventually becomes an important source of manpower, as the indefatigable people there spread out across the island, and werewolves become a common sight in the fledgling communities.
- 怪我からの回復: |>28|?R|随着岛屿征服已成定局，格兰特返回海伊尔，最终成为你与当地狼人部落的联络人。{LF}{LF}你们偶尔还会见面，多是商讨关系政策时，他依旧如常板着张苦行僧般的脸恪尽职守。{LF}{LF}当不知疲倦的狼人遍布全岛，海伊尔逐渐成为重要兵源基地，新兴社区里随处可见狼人的身影。

- Recover from Injury: |>29|?R|Grant was reluctant to board the ship at first, but after a heart-to-heart talk, he decided that he could always return later, and nervously left his homeland behind him.{LF}{LF}More than able to keep pace with the orcs of Tsarath in terms of physical strength, he busied himself with being generally helpful, and eventually made himself a fixture on the docks in the town where you landed.{LF}{LF}He often wondered aloud about how long he should stay and about what he would say to his father when he went home, but one day, one of the other workers at the dock confessed to having feelings for him, and the talk of going home disappeared overnight.{LF}{LF}They live together now in a cabin they built themselves, and Grant's gruff demeanor seems to have softer corners.
- 怪我からの回復: |>29|?R|格兰特起初不愿登船，但推心置腹交谈后，他想着反正随时能回来，便忐忑地离开了故乡。{LF}{LF}他体力不输查拉斯的兽人，整日忙前忙后帮忙，后来在你登陆的城镇码头扎了根。{LF}{LF}他常嘀咕该待多久、回家怎么跟父亲交代，直到某天码头工友向他表白，还乡话题一夜消失。{LF}{LF}如今他们住在自建木屋，格兰特粗犷的性子也透出几分温柔。

- Recover from Injury: |>29|?R|With the blessing of his father, Grant remained with you, to serve as a symbol of the Lycanthropes dedication to the new nation.{LF}{LF}He has remained close, helpful, and eager to pitch in, whether you need an extra pair of hands with rebuilding or an extra pair of folded arms at a negotiation table.{LF}{LF}Owing to his high visibility, Hayill soon sees a fair amount of immigration from the mainland and becomes a secondary hub for your government, overseeing the entirety of the Knightwood region.{LF}{LF}Werewolf guardsmen in uniform are a common sight in western towns, and common folk, once wary, have come to rely upon them.{LF}{LF}Grant is very proud of this, and remains your confidant and friend.
- 怪我からの回復: |>29|?R|得到父亲祝福的格兰特留在你身边，成为狼人对新国度忠诚的象征。{LF}{LF}无论是重建需要帮手还是谈判需要助力，他始终随叫随到，热心参与各项事务。{LF}{LF}因他知名度高，海伊尔很快迎来大量大陆移民，成为你政府管辖整个骑士林地区的副中心。{LF}{LF}西部城镇常见穿制服的狼人士兵，曾怀戒心的百姓也开始信赖他们。{LF}{LF}格兰特对此深感自豪，始终是你可托付秘密的挚友。

- Recover from Injury: |>31|?R|Greave took the reformation of the island very seriously, and ended up making it his personal mission to dismantle the stocks and other facilities like it.{LF}{LF}He met surprisingly little opposition, and eventually gathered what few good guardsmen he could find and returned to the Crest mainland to make sure that the general populace heard all about what Lukatt really was.{LF}{LF}His news enraged the people, most of whom had a friend of a friend who had been shipped out, and now, at the risk of making enemies of a lot of powerful men, he is trying to start an inquest to uncover corruption within Crest's judiciary system.
- 怪我からの回復: |>31|?R|格里夫郑重对待岛屿改革，将拆除枷锁刑具等设施视为己任。{LF}{LF}他遭遇的阻力意外地小，后来带着少数优秀卫兵返回克雷斯特大陆，誓要让民众看清卢卡特真相。{LF}{LF}消息激起公愤——多数人都有亲友被流放至此。如今他不惜与权贵为敌，正全力推动司法系统腐败调查。

- Recover from Injury: |>31|?R|Satisfied to be out of immediate danger, Greave soon made arrangements to return to the Crest mainland and report on what he had seen.{LF}{LF}He seemed confident that use of the stocks would cease once it became clear that escape was now possible, but when he tried to inform people what had happened, he was quickly tried as a deserter and found guilty.{LF}{LF}He is now interned somewhere on the mainland.
- 怪我からの回復: |>31|?R|脱离险境的格里夫很快安排返回克雷斯特大陆汇报见闻。{LF}{LF}他本以为越狱可能曝光后刑具会停用，但试图揭露真相时，反被迅速以逃兵罪定罪。{LF}{LF}如今他正被拘禁在大陆某处。

- Recover from Injury: |>32|?R|Greave swore that he wouldn't let another travesty like the stocks occur again, so when the island was taken, he asked you to put him in charge of dismantling the remaining facilities.{LF}{LF}When he and his team marched on the stocks, they found them severely undermanned, and quickly rounded up what soldiers and prisoners remained.{LF}{LF}With a little work, he was able to convert the stocks into a coastal stronghold, and he remains there, helping to coordinate rebuilding efforts on the west coast of the island.{LF}{LF}Mainly, he focuses on preventing Crest infiltrators from interfering with the development of the young nation, and he remains dedicated and driven.
- 怪我からの回復: |>32|?R|格里夫发誓绝不让枷锁悲剧重演，占领岛屿后便主动请缨负责拆除剩余设施。{LF}{LF}他带队突袭刑场时发现守备空虚，很快控制留守士兵与囚犯。{LF}{LF}经他改造，刑场变海岸要塞，他驻守此地协调西岸重建工作。{LF}{LF}主要防范克雷斯特间谍干扰新生国家建设，始终充满干劲与奉献精神。

- Recover from Injury: |>32|?R|Knowing that returning to Crest would be the end of him, Greave instead tried to get the word out about the atrocities of the island by notifying the Tsarathi authorities through anonymous missives.{LF}{LF}When the authorities failed to do anything about it, he took on the moniker ”Crowquill” and began distributing stories of events on the island to the public at large, leaving them in busy places and generally making himself impossible to find.{LF}{LF}Though nothing has been done in an official capacity, he buries a wry smile in his beard as he hears customers gossiping about his latest pages at the smithy where he works, and people have begun independantly copying and spreading his work around.{LF}{LF}Eventually, he tells you, something will snap.
- 怪我からの回復: |>32|?R|明知回到克雷斯特就是死路一条，格里夫转而尝试通过匿名信函向察拉提当局举报，试图将岛上的暴行公之于众。{LF}{LF}当局对此毫无作为后，他便以“鸦羽”为代号，开始向大众散布岛上事件的纪实报道——将文稿留在繁华地段，行踪飘忽不定。{LF}{LF}虽无官方行动，但听到铁匠铺顾客热议他最新发布的传单，眼见人们自发抄写传播他的作品，他总在络腮胡下掩藏一抹苦笑。{LF}{LF}他告诉你，终有一日，这根弦会绷断。

- Recover from Injury: |>34|?R|Greening faced some significant culture shock when trying to integrate into Tsarathi life, finding little demand for his passionately-produced pastries.{LF}{LF}Settling for crafts gradually further and further from his heart, he eventually found a place in a butcher, where his careful eye for detail goes largely unappreciated.{LF}{LF}He gives away his conjured cookies for free, hoping they will catch on, but so far the only real demand comes from odd gangs of poor children.
- 怪我からの回復: |>34|?R|格林宁在融入察拉提生活时遭遇了严重的文化冲击——他倾注热情烤制的糕点竟无人问津。{LF}{LF}他不得不逐渐从事与初心相去甚远的手艺，最终在肉铺谋得职位，但精细的做事风格却无人赏识。{LF}{LF}他免费赠送用魔法变出的饼干，指望能打开销路，可迄今真正的顾客只有几群举止古怪的穷苦孩童。

- Recover from Injury: |>34|?R|Once a permanent stronghold was established, Greening appointed himself ”dinnermaster” and set up a community eatery.{LF}{LF}He relies on some good old-fashioned cooking for the most part, only very occasionally (he promises) testing out his magicks on unsuspecting diners.{LF}{LF}For the most part, he remains well-liked among the people, and is glad to be using his talents for roasting entrees instead of enemies.
- 怪我からの回復: |>34|?R|永久据点刚建成，格林宁就自封“晚宴大师”，办起了社区食堂。{LF}{LF}他主要靠传统手艺做饭，只偶尔（他保证）对毫无戒心的食客试验魔法料理。{LF}{LF}总体而言他仍颇受居民欢迎，自己也庆幸能将烤制天赋用在料理而非烤焦敌人上。

- Recover from Injury: |>35|?R|Greening seemed a bit lost once rebuilding efforts began, and was not particularly well-suited to the requisite labour.{LF}{LF}He made an effort to help out with provisioning whenever he could, and seemed to really enjoy it, so once you had enough hands to keep things running without him, you suggested that he open his own cafe, and he took to the notion with enthusiastic delight.{LF}{LF}He fussed over the precise design and layout of the place for far longer than was necessary, but eventually, he opened shop, and now he and a few carefully-trained assistants run a tight business.{LF}{LF}His cafe is particularly popular with visiting dignitaries who appreciate his eccentric taste and attention to detail, and he seems happy to be there.
- 怪我からの回復: |>35|?R|重建工作启动后，格林宁显得无所适从，体力活也非他所长。{LF}{LF}他总主动协助物资调配且乐在其中，待人手充足后，你便建议他开家咖啡馆，他欣喜若狂地采纳了。{LF}{LF}他为店面设计布局纠结了许久，最终咖啡馆顺利开张，如今他与几位精心培训的助手经营得井井有条。{LF}{LF}这家店尤其受访政要青睐——他们欣赏其独特品味与细节把控，而他也在此找到了归属。

- Recover from Injury: |>35|?R|Not finding much demand for his pastries in Tsarath, Greening was nonetheless determined to make an impression on his stubborn orc hosts.{LF}{LF}He shifted his focus onto grilling, and through practice and arcane taboo, he was soon able to serve up a rack of barbequed ribs that even an ogre would swoon over.{LF}{LF}He now wages open war against empty orc bellies in his popular grill pit, where he serves strong sauce and stronger beer, and to his delight, he even manages to move a few baskets of butter biscuits now and then.
- 怪我からの回復: |>35|?R|尽管糕点不受察拉提人待见，格林宁仍决心打动固执的兽人东道主。{LF}{LF}他将重心转向烧烤，通过勤学苦练与秘法禁忌，很快便能烤出连食人魔都垂涎的肋排。{LF}{LF}如今他在火爆的烧烤摊向兽人空瘪的胃袋公开宣战，供应烈酱与更烈的啤酒；更令他欣喜的是，偶尔还能卖出几篮黄油饼干。

- Recover from Injury: |>37|?R|Kirilo took almost immediately to watching out for newly-arriving immigrants, accompanying convoys along the roads and making sure that everybody was safely settled in.{LF}{LF}You hear mixed reports regarding him, some appreciative and others less so, but he is trying his best to stay involved and to give honest people a chance to dig in to their new lives.
- 怪我からの回復: |>37|?R|基里洛立即承担起照料新移民的职责，护送沿途车队并确保众人安稳落户。{LF}{LF}关于他的评价毁誉参半，但他始终努力保持参与，给踏实之人扎根新生活的机会。

- Recover from Injury: |>37|?R|Used to being surrounded by humans, Kirilo was was accustomed to being stronger than his peers, but in Tsarath where competition for status is fierce, he found himself to be actually quite slight in comparison to his fellow orcs.{LF}{LF}When trying to stop a thief in the market one day, he found himself hopelessly outmatched, and was badly beaten. In the weeks that followed, poor medical care resulted in his condition worsening, and he spent his final night alone in an alley in an impoverished slum, his spirit as broken as his body.
- 怪我からの回復: |>37|?R|惯于在人类中生活的基里洛曾引以为傲的力量，在地位竞争激烈的察拉提却相形见绌。{LF}{LF}某日他试图在市场擒贼，竟遭彻底压制而重伤。随后数周因医治不善伤势恶化，最终在贫民窟暗巷孤身离世——精神与肉体皆已破碎。

- Recover from Injury: |>38|?R|Kirilo seemed like he was going to involve himself regardless, so when smaller communities of immigrants began to form on the island, you appointed Kirilo the head of security for a group of them and gave him the authority and funds to hire his own people.{LF}{LF}He makes regular reports to you as to the status of his districts, and all reports suggest that under his guidance, those communities have remained very safe. {LF}{LF}He remains well-regarded by the downtrodden (and formerly downtrodden), and would have it no other way.{LF}{LF}
- 怪我からの回復: |>38|?R|见基里洛执意参与事务，待移民社群初具规模时，你便任命他担任安保主管，拨付资金让他自行组建团队。{LF}{LF}他定期汇报辖区状况，所有情报都显示在他的治理下社区治安良好。{LF}{LF}他始终深受底层民众（及曾经的受压迫者）敬重，而这也正是他心之所向。{LF}{LF}

- Recover from Injury: |>38|?R|Kirilo, feeding his ever-present need to fight for the downtrodden, found his place in Tsarath at one of the many orphanages, where his kind and selfless attitude was quickly appreciated.{LF}{LF}He earns coin by working as a runner most days, and then returns home to his boys and to a gaffer who is growing more fond of him by the day.{LF}{LF}It isn't nearly as dramatic a life as he is used to, but he concedes that perhaps he has had enough life and death drama for one lifetime, and seems content to settle down.
- 怪我からの回復: |>38|?R|基里洛内心始终怀有为受压迫者而战的渴望，他在扎拉斯的众多孤儿院中找到了自己的位置，那里的人们很快就欣赏起他善良无私的态度。{LF}{LF}他大多日子靠当跑腿挣钱，然后回到他的孩子们和一位日渐喜欢他的老工头身边。{LF}{LF}这远不如他习惯的生活那样戏剧性，但他承认自己这辈子经历的生死戏剧已经够多了，似乎很满足于安定下来。

- Recover from Injury: |>40|?L|Leftie was helpful and enthusiastic about repairing the boat, but on the morning you were ready to leave, he told you he wouldn't be coming.{LF}{LF}Still unwilling to speak of his crimes, he only said that he was better off on Lukatt, and would not be dissuaded.{LF}{LF}He wished you well and stood on the beach as you left, waving you off, and that was the last you ever saw or heard of him.
- 怪我からの回復: |>40|?L|左撇子对修船很热心，帮了不少忙，但在你们准备离开的那天早上，他却告诉你们他不打算一起走。{LF}{LF}他依然不愿谈及自己的罪行，只说留在卢卡特对他更好，态度坚决，不容劝说。{LF}{LF}他祝你们好运，在你们离开时站在海滩上挥手告别，这便是你们最后一次见到或听说他的消息。

- Recover from Injury: |>40|?L|Leftie's mood turned foul as more people arrived on the island, and after the first few loads of immigrants arrived, he withdrew.{LF}{LF}You heard rumors that a man matching his description was spotted with a ragtag mercenary crew.{LF}{LF}Though you can't be certain if those rumors are true or not, one thing you can be sure of is that Leftie wants no part of civilized life.
- 怪我からの回復: |>40|?L|随着更多人来到岛上，左撇子的心情变得恶劣起来，在最初几批移民抵达后，他便消失了。{LF}{LF}你听到传闻，说有个符合他特征的人和一个杂牌佣兵团混在一起。{LF}{LF}虽然你无法确定这些传闻是真是假，但有一点可以肯定：左撇子根本不想过什么文明生活。

- Recover from Injury: |>41|?L|When you chose to keep Leftie close instead of cutting him free, something moved within the giant man, and he devoted himself to you and to your campaigns wholeheartedly.{LF}{LF}His breadth of experience working odd jobs and his unsinkable constitution have made him an invaluable asset to the rebuilding efforts, and he is high in demand when labour teams are being chosen.{LF}{LF}Being away from the mainland long-term seems to have given him some sense of closure, and he works hard to ensure that his second chance at life is not wasted.{LF}{LF}He makes his home near your capital stronghold, and still makes efforts to see you as often as he can. He often tells you to call upon him at the slightest need, and regards you highly as both a leader and as a friend.
- 怪我からの回復: |>41|?L|当你选择把左撇子留在身边而不是让他离开时，这个巨汉内心似乎有所触动，从此全心全意地追随你，投身于你的各项行动。{LF}{LF}他干过各种杂活的丰富经验和打不垮的体魄，在重建工作中成了无价之宝，组建劳动队时他总是抢手人选。{LF}{LF}长期远离大陆似乎让他了结了某些心结，他努力工作，确保不浪费这第二次人生的机会。{LF}{LF}他在你首都要塞附近安了家，仍尽可能常来看你。他总说有事随时叫他，无论是作为领袖还是朋友，他都对你极为敬重。

- Recover from Injury: |>41|?L|Initially, Leftie did not want to get on the boat, claiming that it was better for him to just stay and be forgotten.{LF}{LF}When you tried to convince him, he got agitated, and you fought in the sand.{LF}{LF}You punched him and told him you weren't leaving him behind, and he held you and wept, with the rest of your band awkwardly trying not to stare.{LF}{LF}Before long, you were gliding out to sea with Leftie by your side, his swollen black eye shining with appreciation.{LF}{LF}|In the years thet followed, Leftie was always close by, backing your every move and decision, and he never forgot that you were the one who had faith in him even when he had none in himself.{LF}{LF}He seemed wholly unbothered by a life of hard labour in his new home among the orcs of Tsarath, and he made a point of living somewhere nearby, and scarcely went more than a few days without at least stopping in to see how you were doing.{LF}{LF}Though he always had a quick temper, he was also loyal and quick to forgive, and you never observed Leftie to be the monster he claimed to be.
- 怪我からの回復: |>41|?L|起初，左撇子不肯上船，说他最好还是留下来被人遗忘。{LF}{LF}当你试图说服他时，他激动起来，你们在沙滩上打了起来。{LF}{LF}你给了他一拳，说不会丢下他不管，他抱住你哭了，队伍里其他人都尴尬地尽量不去看。{LF}{LF}不久后，你们便扬帆出海，左撇子就在你身边，他那乌青肿胀的眼睛里闪着感激的光。{LF}{LF}|在那之后的岁月里，左撇子始终紧随左右，支持你的每一个行动和决定，他从未忘记，在他自己都不相信自己时，是你给了他信任。{LF}{LF}他似乎完全不在意在扎拉斯兽人中间的新生活中所要付出的艰苦劳动，特意住在你附近，几乎每隔几天就会过来看看你怎么样。{LF}{LF}虽然他脾气一直很急，但也忠诚不二，气消得快，你从未觉得左撇子像他自称的那样是个怪物。

- Recover from Injury: |>43|?L|Moria left after your battle with Leviathan was over, saying she had no interest in going back to the mainland.{LF}{LF}She packed up her meager things and headed off into the wilds of Lukatt alone, where she takes great satisfaction in her daily struggles to survive.
- 怪我からの回復: |>43|?L|与利维坦的战斗结束后，莫瑞亚就离开了，她说她对返回大陆没兴趣。{LF}{LF}她收拾起少得可怜的行装，独自一人深入卢卡特的荒野，在那里，为生存而进行的日常挣扎让她感到极大的满足。

- Recover from Injury: |>43|?L|Although Moria participated eagerly in the conquest of the island, once all of the major battles had been won, she had little interest in participating further.{LF}{LF}She left to live on her own, away from the conveniences and confines of civilization, and you have heard no reports of her at all.{LF}{LF}Presumably she is happier to be left alone.
- 怪我からの回復: |>43|?L|虽然莫瑞亚曾积极参与征服此岛，但所有主要战事一结束，她便对后续事宜失去了兴趣。{LF}{LF}她离去独自生活，远离文明的便利与束缚，此后你便再也没听到过任何关于她的消息。{LF}{LF}想来她更乐意一个人待着。

- Recover from Injury: |>44|?L|Moria, having been disillusioned on the trappings of modern civilization already, seemed uneasy when your campaigns shifted from battle to rebuilding. She clearly didn't want to be part of the bustle of new and growing communities.{LF}{LF}Knowing that she preferred her life to be hard-fought, you asked her if she would consider helping on the frontiers as a ranger, hunting and scouting, and this idea seemed to appeal to her.{LF}{LF}You hardly ever hear from her anymore, but she is spotted from time to time in town, selling pelts or meat at the marketplaces, and sometimes guiding lost travelers to safe communities.{LF}{LF}She clearly prefers to be left alone, but her continued participation tells you that she is content.
- 怪我からの回復: |>44|?L|莫里亚早已对现代文明的种种束缚感到幻灭，当你的行动重心从征战转向重建时，她显得颇为不安。显然，她并不想卷入新兴社区那种忙忙碌碌的氛围。{LF}{LF}你知道她更喜欢艰苦拼搏的生活，便问她是否愿意作为一名游侠去边疆效力，负责狩猎和侦察，这个提议似乎正合她意。{LF}{LF}如今你几乎收不到她的消息，只是偶尔有人在镇上看到她，在集市贩卖毛皮或肉类，有时也会为迷路的旅人指引通往安全社区的路。{LF}{LF}她显然更愿意独处，但她持续参与这些事务足以说明，她对现状是满意的。

- Recover from Injury: |>44|?L|Although she had no love for the idea of returning to civilization, you managed to convince Moria that Tsarath would offer ample opportunities for a survivalist lifestyle, and she agreed to make the journey with you.{LF}{LF}Nearly immediately upon arrival, she set out for Tsarath's rugged tundra frontiers, and took up company with a band of loosely-affiliated nomads, moving from place to place as the seasons turned, and earning their living by the sweat of their labour.{LF}{LF}You only saw her once after that, but she was still strong, healthy, and glad to be living a life that she felt she had properly earned.
- 怪我からの回復: |>44|?L|尽管莫里亚对重返文明社会毫无兴趣，但你还是成功说服了她，告诉她萨拉思能为她这种生存主义者提供充足的机会，她最终同意与你同行。{LF}{LF}几乎是一抵达，她就直奔萨拉思崎岖的冻土边疆，加入了一个联系松散的游牧部落，随着季节更迭辗转各地，依靠辛勤的汗水谋生。{LF}{LF}那之后你只见过她一次，但她依然强壮、健康，并且为自己能过上这种她觉得是凭本事挣来的生活而感到高兴。

- Recover from Injury: |>46|?R|Nazar was seemingly involved in everything once events on the island began to pick up. {LF}{LF}He participated eagerly in both the conquest and the rebuilding effort, lending a cheerful hand to anyone who asked.{LF}{LF}He still comes by your stronghold to see you from time to time, and last you heard from him, he was working with a shipbiulding crew in Greenback Bay.
- 怪我からの回復: |>46|?R|岛上的局势一旦开始好转，纳扎尔似乎就什么事都掺和一脚。{LF}{LF}无论是征服行动还是重建工作，他都积极参与，只要有人求助，他总会乐呵呵地伸出援手。{LF}{LF}他现在仍会时不时来你的要塞看望你，而你上次听到他的消息时，他正在绿背湾的一个造船队里工作。

- Recover from Injury: |>46|?R|Nazar helped you make preparations for the trip, but refused to return to Tsarath, saying he preferred to remain on Lukatt instead.{LF}{LF}He went to Greenback Bay, where he found himself high in demand on labour teams and guard teams, as well as in the arms of lonely castaways, and is as happy there as he has ever been.
- 怪我からの回復: |>46|?R|纳扎尔帮你做好了旅行的准备，但拒绝返回萨拉思，说他更愿意留在卢卡特。{LF}{LF}他去了绿背湾，在那里，无论是劳务队、警卫队，还是寂寞的落难者的怀抱，他都大受欢迎，过得和以往一样快活。

- Recover from Injury: |>47|?R|Torn between his dislike of Tsarathi laws and the idea of losing you to them, Nazar nervously accompanied you back to the mainland.{LF}{LF}Though he had grown up in one of the Tsarathi military schools, he had no family to speak of and no real place to go back to, so he stuck close by your side, an obvious affection for you shining through his every move.{LF}{LF}He was eventually able to find steady work as woodsman, and made his permanent home as close to you as he could manage.{LF}{LF}Indeed, it became hard to remember a time when Nazar's affection and support were not a constant feature of your life.
- 怪我からの回復: |>47|?R|纳扎尔既厌恶萨拉斯的律法，又怕你会因此离他而去，在两种情绪的撕扯下，他惴惴不安地陪你回到了大陆。{LF}{LF}尽管他是在萨拉斯的一所军事学校里长大的，但那里没有他的家人，也没有真正可称之为归宿的地方，所以他紧紧跟随着你，一举一动都透露出对你显而易见的爱慕。{LF}{LF}他最终找到了一份稳定的伐木工工作，并把永久住所安在了尽可能靠近你的地方。{LF}{LF}说真的，如今已经很难想象生活中没有纳扎尔的深情与支持会是什么样子了。

- Recover from Injury: |>47|?R|Nazar made good on his promise to keep your shoulders warm, and he has cheerfully made a space for himself in your bed every night since that night in the old church.{LF}{LF}Once events with Crest began to settle down, and it became clear that life on the island would be more relaxed, the two of you were married formally, in a grand ceremony in the capital, before a crowd of hundreds of cheering Lukattites.{LF}{LF}Supporting both your efforts to help reconstruct life on the island and you personally, people began to quietly compare him to the memory of Maxim Spartill, lord consort of the island's last queen.{LF}{LF}As the closest and dearest admirer of his heroic form and demeanor, you find that comparison difficult to argue.
- 怪我からの回復: |>47|?R|纳扎尔兑现了为你暖床的承诺，自打那晚在老教堂过后，他每晚都高高兴兴地在你的床上占有一席之地。{LF}{LF}等到与克雷斯特相关的事件逐渐平息，岛上的生活显然将更为安宁时，你们二人在首都举行了一场盛大典礼，在数百名欢呼的卢卡特人见证下正式结为夫妻。{LF}{LF}他既支持你为重建岛屿生活所做的努力，也给予你个人无微不至的关怀，人们开始私下里将他比作岛上末代女王的配偶——马克西姆·斯帕蒂尔的往日风采。{LF}{LF}作为他最亲近、最珍视他英雄气概与风度的仰慕者，你发现这个比喻确实无可辩驳。

- Recover from Injury: |>47|?R|Nazar was obviously distressed at the idea of going back to Tsarath, but he held your hand tightly as the view of the island grew distant across the water.{LF}{LF}When you arrived at the mainland, he was surprised to find the Tsarathi commonfolk showing a great deal of support and sympathy for those bearing the scapegoat brand.{LF}{LF}Without the need to live a secluded life, Nazar became a social member of the rural community where the two of you lived, and you were eventually married in a small temple, according to Tsarathi traditions.{LF}{LF}You live together in a cottage that you built with help from your neighbors, and your life is both simple and fulfilling.
- 怪我からの回復: |>47|?R|重返萨拉思这个念头显然让纳扎尔深感不安，但当岛屿的景色在水面上逐渐远去时，他紧紧握住了你的手。{LF}{LF}抵达大陆后，他惊讶地发现，萨拉斯的普通民众对那些带着替罪羊烙印的人表现出了极大的支持与同情。{LF}{LF}无需再过着与世隔绝的生活，纳扎尔成了你们所居住的乡村社区里一位善于交际的成员，你们最终按照萨拉斯的传统，在一座小神庙里结了婚。{LF}{LF}你们在邻居们的帮助下建起了一座小屋，共同居住其中，生活虽简朴，却无比充实。

- Recover from Injury: |>47|?R|Nazar was eager to involve himself with the labour crews once rebuilding began, and quickly established himself as ”foreman” once again.{LF}{LF}He remained close to you, even as rebuilding efforts spread across the island, and you began to hear rumors that he was gaining something of a reputation as a heartbreaker. Apparently he attracted a great number of interested suitors, yet rebuffed them all.{LF}{LF}When you asked him about it in friendly conversation, he seemed rather embarassed, telling you that there was in fact someone whose eye he was hoping to catch.{LF}{LF}Nazar remains close by, making himself available for whatever you need, and continuing to turn away suitors while waiting patiently for the one he really wants to notice him.
- 怪我からの回復: |>47|?R|重建工作一开始，纳扎尔就迫不及待地加入了劳动队伍，很快又当上了“工头”。{LF}{LF}即使重建工作遍布全岛，他也始终陪伴在你身边。你还开始听到一些传闻，说他成了个“芳心纵火犯”。显然他吸引了不少追求者，但全都拒绝了。{LF}{LF}当你在闲聊中问起这事时，他显得有些尴尬，告诉你其实他心里早就有了想引起注意的人。{LF}{LF}纳扎尔依然守在你身边，随时听候差遣，一边拒绝着其他追求者，一边耐心等待着他真正想要的那个人能注意到他。

- Recover from Injury: |>49|?R|Paul was happy to have been helpful with your survival, but he mostly got in the way when it came to repairing the boat, and he eventually decided that his time with you was at an end.{LF}{LF}He made a home for himself near Spartill Lodge, where he continues to work the forests for anyone willing to pay him for his time.
- 怪我からの回復: |>49|?R|保罗很庆幸能帮你活下来，但修船时他大多在帮倒忙，最后他觉得是时候离开你了。{LF}{LF}他在斯巴提尔旅馆附近安了家，继续为愿意付钱的人在林子里干活。

- Recover from Injury: |>49|?R|Paul seemed a bit lost after the island was conquered, unsure whether to celebrate with everyone else or not.{LF}{LF}Though most people seemed to have no problem with him or with giants in general, he seemed self-conscious. He went back to being a labourer for hire, ensuring that only those who truly wanted his services would have them.{LF}{LF}Most recent reports say that he is employed with a logging crew in the Knightwood region, where his knowledge of the terrain and great strength are high in demand.
- 怪我からの回復: |>49|?R|征服岛屿后，保罗似乎有些迷茫，不确定该不该和大家一起庆祝。{LF}{LF}虽然大多数人似乎并不介意他，也不介意巨人这个种族，但他自己却显得很拘谨。他重操旧业当起了雇工，确保只有真正需要他服务的人才能雇到他。{LF}{LF}最新消息说，他在奈特伍德地区的一个伐木队工作，那里对他的地形知识和巨力需求很高。

- Recover from Injury: |>50|?R|Paul was excited to be part of all the activity surrounding your departure, and it wasn't until you were out at sea already that he started having second thoughts.{LF}{LF}You managed to talk him down, however, and when you finally arrived in Tsarath, Paul drew less attention than he had expected.{LF}{LF}Though not exactly common, many of the people there had seen their share of giants already, and when he made himself available for labour jobs, he quickly found himself with as much work as he could handle.{LF}{LF}Being part of a community was a new experience for Paul, but he found it to his liking, and he soon moved into a permanent home of his own construction in a small frontier town, where he remains busy and content.
- 怪我からの回復: |>50|?R|保罗对你离开前的各种活动都很兴奋，直到你们已经出海了，他才开始犹豫起来。{LF}{LF}不过你成功说服了他。当你们最终抵达萨拉斯时，保罗引起的关注比他预想的要少。{LF}{LF}虽然巨人并不常见，但那里的许多人都见过世面。当他开始接活时，很快就发现自己有干不完的活儿。{LF}{LF}成为社区一员对保罗来说是新鲜事，但他很喜欢这样。不久后，他就在一个边境小镇自己盖了房子定居下来，过着忙碌而满足的生活。

- Recover from Injury: |>50|?R|Once the conquest of the island was complete, Paul quickly became instrumental in the rebuilding efforts.{LF}{LF}He and some of the others came together and formed their own organization to coordinate divisions of labour and supplies, and Paul was there in the thick of it. He was frequently seen inspecting shipments in port and reviewing building sites to ensure that the work was solid.{LF}{LF}He has since established a headquarters for his guild in Greenback Bay, where he hosts visiting experts and workers as needed.{LF}{LF}Although you did not personally oversee its formation, Paul makes a point of reporting the labour guild's progress to you, perhaps more as an excuse to see you face-to-face than out of necessity, and he remains very loudly fond of you.
- 怪我からの回復: |>50|??R|征服岛屿后，保罗很快成为重建工作的关键人物。{LF}{LF}他和其他一些人组建了自己的组织，协调劳动力和物资分配，保罗就是其中的核心。人们经常看到他在港口检查货物，巡视建筑工地，确保工程质量。{LF}{LF}此后，他在绿背湾为公会设立了总部，根据需要接待来访的专家和工人。{LF}{LF}虽然你没有亲自参与公会的建立，但保罗坚持向你汇报工会的进展，这或许更多是为了见你一面找的借口，而不是真的必要。他依然毫不掩饰对你的喜爱。

- Recover from Injury: |>52|?L|Once you arrived in Tsarath, Peregrine began burgling again almost immediately.{LF}{LF}He quickly found, however, that without his previous network of contacts, the profession was much more dangerous than he was accustomed to, and a persistent manhunt for him has been on ever since his first heist.{LF}{LF}His life is spent nervously hiding from bootsteps in mouldering hovels and sleeping with one eye open.
- 怪我からの回復: |>52|?L|一到萨拉斯，佩里格林就立刻重操旧业，干起了盗窃的勾当。{LF}{LF}但他很快发现，没有了以前的关系网，这行当比他习惯的要危险得多。自从第一次作案后，他就一直被穷追不舍。{LF}{LF}他整天提心吊胆地躲在破败的小屋里，听着外面的脚步声，睡觉都得睁一只眼。

- Recover from Injury: |>52|?L|Peregrine particularly delighted in the conquest of the island and the struggle with Crest that followed immediately thereafter.{LF}{LF}He traveled back and forth between Lukatt and the mainland regularly, being something of a deliberate thorn in the side of haughty politicians, and using the island as a sort of safe home base.{LF}{LF}You have, of course, heard rumors of this, but no official complaints or reports have come to you, so for the time being, it seems unnecessary to interfere.
- 怪我からの回復: |>52|?L|佩里格林特别享受征服岛屿以及随后与克雷斯特的斗争。{LF}{LF}他定期往返于卢卡特和大陆之间，故意给傲慢的政客们添堵，把岛屿当作安全的后方基地。{LF}{LF}你当然听说过这些传闻，但既然没有收到正式的投诉或报告，暂时看来没有必要干涉。

- Recover from Injury: |>53|?L|Peregrine had previously spent a great deal of time working as a sailor as a cover for his burgling, and he took your move to Tsarath as an opportunity to embrace that work full-time.{LF}{LF}It didn't take him long to secure a position working on a merchant ship, and he is now well-paid to make shipping runs back and forth for some of the very people he used to burgle.{LF}{LF}Though he sometimes complains that he misses the excitement, he adds that not having to constantly look over his shoulder and fear for his safety is a nice perk, and he seems content in the choices he has made.{LF}{LF}Whenever he is in port, he makes a point of checking up on you and stopping by to share a bottle of whatever expensive liquor he has managed to stow away.
- 怪我からの回復: |>53|?L|佩里格林以前曾长期以水手身份作为盗窃活动的掩护，他将你搬去扎拉斯的机会视为全职投入这份工作的契机。{LF}{LF}他很快就找到了一份商船上的工作，如今拿着高薪为那些他曾偷窃过的人往返运送货物。{LF}{LF}虽然他有时会抱怨想念那种刺激感，但也补充说不用时刻提心吊胆、担心自身安全是个不错的额外好处，他似乎对自己做出的选择感到满意。{LF}{LF}每当靠港时，他总会特意来看望你，顺便带上他偷偷藏起来的各种昂贵酒水与你分享。

- Recover from Injury: |>53|?L|With a lack of anyone wealthy to plunder, or indeed, a lack of much use for wealth on the island at all, Peregrine found himself living his cover story full time once the island's conquest was secured.{LF}{LF}He moved to Greenback Bay and helped out at first with the crews building Lukatt's new navy, and then later hiring on to shipping voyages.{LF}{LF}He clearly prefers life on the move, and is so hard to track that you rarely see him, but every once in a great while, he'll stop in and force you to make time to share a drink or a dirty story.{LF}{LF}
- 怪我からの回復: |>53|?L|岛上既没有值得劫掠的富人，实际上财富本身也几乎无用武之地，因此在成功征服该岛后，佩里格林发现自己过上了全职的伪装生活。{LF}{LF}他搬到了绿背湾，起初协助建造卢卡特新海军的船员，后来受雇从事航运工作。{LF}{LF}他显然更喜欢漂泊不定的生活，行踪难以捉摸，所以你很少能见到他。但偶尔，他会突然造访，硬是让你抽出时间陪他喝一杯或是讲些荤段子。{LF}{LF}

- Recover from Injury: |>55|?R|Rangda refused to return to Tsarath, and left your company as soon as you found the boat.{LF}{LF}She eventually made her way to Marsaven on the southeast side of the island and decided to settle in, but has had difficulty making friends, as many of the people there have little patience for her attitude.{LF}{LF}She is still finding herself, but does not regret leaving her old life behind.
- 怪我からの回復: |>55|?R|兰达拒绝返回扎拉斯，并在你们找到船后立即离开了你们的队伍。{LF}{LF}她最终来到了岛屿东南部的马尔萨文，决定在此定居，但由于当地许多人对她的态度缺乏耐心，她在交友方面遇到了困难。{LF}{LF}她仍在寻找自我，但并不后悔抛弃过去的生活。

- Recover from Injury: |>55|?R|Rangda eagerly lent her sword to the conquest of the island, and was one of the first to pledge herself as a permanent citizen of Lukatt.{LF}{LF}She was instrumental in the formation of Lukatt's military, eager to work with veterans and soldiers outside of the context of Tsarath's laws, and she even spearheaded a training program specifically for women and girls.{LF}{LF}Reports on her progress suggest that she is not particularly popular with her recruits, however, as she tends to be harder on them than even the standard military training programs.{LF}{LF}Attendance in her program is low, and the dropout rate is high.
- 怪我からの回復: |>55|?R|兰达热心地为征服该岛贡献了自己的力量，并且是首批宣誓成为卢卡特永久公民的人之一。{LF}{LF}她在卢卡特军队的组建中发挥了关键作用，热衷于在扎拉斯法律框架之外与退伍军人和士兵合作，甚至牵头设立了一个专为女性及女孩设计的训练项目。{LF}{LF}然而，关于她进展的报告显示，她在新兵中并不太受欢迎，因为她对待他们比标准军事训练项目还要严苛。{LF}{LF}她的项目参与率很低，而辍学率却很高。

- Recover from Injury: |>56|?R|Rangda was adamant that she be involved with the reformation of Lukatt's military forces, and so once the conquest was complete, she set up a training camp for willing recruits.{LF}{LF}Though her teaching style was at first harsh and unpopular, she regularly came to you for advice, and eventually, she relaxed a little and learned to meet the students halfway. Attendance in her program is soaring, with a steady stream of fresh-faced men and women willing and ready to pitch in and defend their new homeland.{LF}{LF}She is now an officer in the growing ranks of Lukatt's military, and she seems pleased to have found a place where she can live the life she chooses.
- 怪我からの回復: |>56|?R|兰达坚持要参与卢卡特军队的重组工作，因此在征服完成后，她为志愿参军者设立了一个训练营。{LF}{LF}虽然起初她的教学方式严厉且不受欢迎，但她经常向你请教，逐渐地，她放松了一些，学会了与学生相互妥协。她的项目参与人数急剧上升，不断有充满朝气的男女自愿加入，准备为保卫新家园贡献力量。{LF}{LF}她现在是日益壮大的卢卡特军队中的一名军官，似乎很高兴找到了一个可以按照自己选择的方式生活的地方。

- Recover from Injury: |>56|?R|She deliberated on the issue for quite a while, but ultimately, Rangda decided to remain on Lukatt instead of returning to Tsarath, knowing that she would eventually be subject to the familiar confines of the law once again.{LF}{LF}She saw you off on the beach and then made her way to Marsaven, where she worked hard to prove herself to the people there and integrate into the community, and eventually became a guardsman.{LF}{LF}Life on Lukatt isn't easy for her, but when she wakes up and straps on her uniform each day, she feels as though she's made the right decision.
- 怪我からの回復: |>56|?R|她对此事斟酌了相当长一段时间，但兰达最终决定留在卢卡特，而不是返回扎拉斯，因为她知道一旦回去，终将再次受到熟悉的法律束缚。{LF}{LF}她在海滩上为你送行，然后前往马尔萨文，在那里努力向当地人证明自己，融入社区，并最终成为了一名卫兵。{LF}{LF}卢卡特的生活对她来说并不轻松，但每天醒来穿上制服时，她都觉得自己做出了正确的决定。

- Recover from Injury: |>58|?R|Rosaline seemed to be nervous about making the journey to Tsarath, and so she ultimately decided to stay on Lukatt.{LF}{LF}She said that there would be other boats eventually, since the seas had been calmed, and that she wanted time to think about what her next move would be.{LF}{LF}She ended up going to the Pumphouse Brewery in the Bracewind region and entertaining guests who were accustomed to long waiting periods.
- 怪我からの回復: |>58|?R|罗莎琳似乎对前往扎拉斯的旅程感到不安，因此最终决定留在卢卡特。{LF}{LF}她说既然海面已经平静下来，以后总会有其他船只的，而且她想花时间考虑下一步该怎么做。{LF}{LF}她最终去了布雷司温德地区的泵房酿酒厂，招待那些早已习惯漫长等待的客人们。

- Recover from Injury: |>58|?R|Rosaline was happy to be a part of the young nation rising on Lukatt, and offered her services to you as an informant and a spy.{LF}{LF}Though you had some doubts initially, a few test cases have proven her extraordinarily competent in this regard, and she was able to give you ample warning in a few situations when agitators from Crest planned to undermine your new nation.{LF}{LF}She is a constant fixture in your stronghold and at any political arrangements that arise, and she seems pleased to be involved.
- 怪我からの回復: |>58|?R|罗莎琳很乐意成为卢卡特星球上崛起的年轻国家的一份子，并主动向你提出担任线人和间谍。{LF}{LF}虽然你最初有些疑虑，但几次测试证明她在这方面能力非凡，当克雷斯特的煽动者企图破坏你的新国家时，她总能及时向你发出充分警告。{LF}{LF}她是你堡垒和各类政治场合的常客，似乎很享受参与其中的感觉。

- Recover from Injury: |>59|?R|Upon arriving in Tsarath, Rosaline did exactly what she said she would do; she found herself a bawdy, bustling tavern and refused to leave until they hired her on as a dancer.{LF}{LF}More than capable of handling herself in a rough crowd, she now dances burlesque to the delight of throngs of merrily drunken orcs, and finds herself rather fond of the attention she gets.{LF}{LF}She now makes plenty enough coin in tips to clothe herself in lavish silks and fine jewelry, and has a long list of devoted admirers.{LF}{LF}She still worries that someday her old troupe will catch up with her, but for the time being, she is meeting life head-on and having a lot of fun in the process.
- 怪我からの回復: |>59|?R|一到查拉斯，罗莎琳就说到做到：她找了家喧闹的低俗酒馆，赖着不走直到对方雇她当舞女。{LF}{LF}她完全能应付粗野的客人，如今为喝得兴高采烈的兽人群众表演滑稽歌舞，还挺享受这种众星捧月的感觉。{LF}{LF}靠小费就能赚得盆满钵满，穿得起奢华丝绸戴得起珠宝首饰，身后还跟着一长串狂热追求者。{LF}{LF}她仍担心有天会被旧剧团逮到，但眼下正勇闯新生活，乐在其中。

- Recover from Injury: |>59|?R|When politics began creeping in to the island, Rosaline insisted on offering her services to you as an informant and spy. Seeing that she would not be dissuaded, you accepted her offer.{LF}{LF}Ostensibly, she haunts your events as a courtesan, sometimes as a Lukattite and other times masquerading as a foreign dignitary. Her extensive training in subterfuge serve her well in this, often providing interesting insight, and she soon becomes indispensable at the negotiating table.{LF}{LF}She insists that she finds the intrigue of court both more palatable than assassinations and more fun than she had expected, so she remains on hand, eager to attend any event you need her for.
- 怪我からの回復: |>59|?R|当政治势力开始渗透岛屿时，罗莎琳坚持要为你效力，担任线人和间谍。见她心意已决，你便接受了她的提议。{LF}{LF}表面上，她以交际花身份混迹于你的各种场合，时而扮作卢卡特本地人，时而伪装成外国使节。她受过全面的伪装训练，这让她如鱼得水，常能提供独到见解，很快成为谈判桌上不可或缺的人物。{LF}{LF}她坚称宫廷权谋比刺杀任务更有趣，也比预期更刺激，因此随时待命，热切期盼参与你需要的任何活动。

- Recover from Injury: |>61|?R|Shapiro found acceptance in Tsarath almost immediately, offering his services to a cabal of independant sorcerers.{LF}{LF}Finding their rules much less restrictive than those of the Crest guilds he was used to, he merrily buries himself in research and experimentation, earning a more or less honest wage, and swearing that he should have come to Tsarath years ago.
- 怪我からの回復: |>61|?R|夏皮罗几乎立刻就在查拉斯找到了归属，为一群独立法师的秘密团体效力。{LF}{LF}发现这里的规矩远比他习惯的克雷斯特公会宽松，他欣然埋头研究与实验，赚着还算干净的薪水，直后悔没早几年来查拉斯。

- Recover from Injury: |>61|?R|When the conquest was complete, Shapiro did what any self-respecting sorcerer would do; he hired a crew to build an ominous tower a short distance from your stronghold and moved in.{LF}{LF}He spends his days in isolation, researching and experimenting, venturing out only once in a while to browse the markets for supplies or to replace a singed coat, and he seems quite content to play the role of the hermit wizard.
- 怪我からの回復: |>61|?R|征服完成后，夏皮罗做了所有自重法师都会做的事：雇人在你堡垒附近修了座阴森高塔，搬了进去。{LF}{LF}他终日离群索居，埋头研究实验，偶尔出门采购物资或换件烧焦的外套，看来很满足于扮演隐士法师的角色。

- Recover from Injury: |>62|?R|When you arrived, Shapiro began to go through some old guild contacts he had, and quickly found himself a fairly discreet position in a Tsarathi guild sect.{LF}{LF}Though the facilities are not as convenient as he was previously used to, he found the differences in approach and attitude to be both fascinating and liberating, and manages to conduct his research more freely than before.{LF}{LF}He is currently mentoring several young orcs as apprentices, and on the rare occasion when you see him, he speaks of them incessantly.{LF}{LF}He is often critical of their progress, but he is clearly glad to have students once again, and overall he seems happy with his life.
- 怪我からの回復: |>62|?R|你抵达后，夏皮罗联系了些旧公会人脉，很快在查拉斯某法师派系谋得低调职位。{LF}{LF}虽然设施不如从前便利，但他觉得这里的行事风格既新奇又自由，研究反而比以往更无拘无束。{LF}{LF}眼下他正指导几名年轻兽人学徒，难得见你一面时，总絮絮叨叨说个不停。{LF}{LF}虽常挑剔他们进度，但明显为重获门徒而欣喜，整体看来对现状相当满意。

- Recover from Injury: |>62|?R|Once your permanent stronghold was secured, Shapiro set out to establish a formal guild of magic on the island, a task he claimed was more borne of necessity than of desire. With a little time and effort, he was eventually able to arrange an appropriate facility a short distance away from your capital.{LF}{LF}Though his demeanor is at a times cold and unsettling, his knowledge regarding magic is undeniably broad, and his experience in guild practice and politics has been especially valuable as your people continue to uncover strange arcana all over the island.{LF}{LF}He makes himself available for consultation whenever any relevant situations arise, but mostly he happily keeps to himself in the new guild, taking apprentices, conducting his (assuredly safe) experiments, and giving the arcane arts a solid foothold in your new home.
- 怪我からの回復: |>62|?R|永久堡垒落成后，夏皮罗着手在岛上建立正规魔法公会，自称是形势所迫而非本意。稍费周折后，他终于在都城附近筹建起合适场所。{LF}{LF}尽管时而态度冷淡令人不安，但其渊博的魔法学识毋庸置疑，随着岛民不断发现神秘秘术，他的公会运作经验显得尤为宝贵。{LF}{LF}遇相关事务时他随叫随到，但多数时间宁愿在新公会独处——收徒授业、进行（号称安全的）实验，为秘术在这片新土地扎下根基。

- Recover from Injury: |>64|?R|Vankan was nigh inconsolable after the death of Leviathan, sobbing for hours on end.{LF}{LF}For whatever reason, he seemed to have been damaged directly by the divine beast's death, and he crawled back into the Bath alone, prostrating himself before Leviathan's body and begging the heavens for forgiveness.{LF}{LF}You gave him some time, but he told you to leave him there, and eventually you were forced to do exactly that.{LF}{LF}He did not follow you or turn up at your stronghold later, and you do not know what happened to him.
- 怪我からの回復: |>64|?R|利维坦死后，万坎几乎无法自持，接连哭泣了好几个小时。{LF}{LF}不知为何，他似乎因神兽之死而直接受到了伤害，独自爬回了浴场，匍匐在利维坦的遗体前，祈求上天的宽恕。{LF}{LF}你给了他一些时间，但他让你把他留在那里，最终你只能照做。{LF}{LF}他没有跟你走，后来也没有出现在你的要塞，你不知道他究竟怎么样了。

- Recover from Injury: |>64|?R|Vankan stayed with you during and after the conquest of the island, seemingly reluctant to let you out of his sight.{LF}{LF}Though he said nothing and put on a cheerful face, something was clearly bothering him.{LF}{LF}One day, as negotiations with Crest dignitaries were about to commence, one of the man's aides pulled a blow gun and launched a dart at you. As if he knew it was coming, Vankan threw himself in front of you, and the dart struck him instead.{LF}{LF}He died in your arms a moment later, ravaged by poison as your guards put your would-be assassin to the sword, but when he went, his face seemed peaceful.
- 怪我からの回復: |>64|?R|在征服岛屿期间及之后，万坎都和你待在一起，似乎不愿让你离开他的视线。{LF}{LF}虽然他什么也没说，还摆出一副开朗的样子，但显然有什么在困扰着他。{LF}{LF}有一天，就在与克雷斯特的显贵们即将开始谈判时，他的一名助手突然掏出吹箭筒，向你射出一支飞镖。万坎仿佛早有预料，猛地扑到你身前，飞镖击中了他。{LF}{LF}片刻之后，他在你的怀抱中死去了——当你的卫兵将那名刺客斩于剑下时，他已被剧毒侵蚀——但离去时，他的面容显得十分安详。

- Recover from Injury: |>65|?R|Relieved beyond measure that you had not been forced to slay Leviathan, Vankan devoted himself to the divine beast's worship. His unique gift apparently made it easier for him to commune, and so Vankan alternately serves you as an advisor and, when it is needed, as a mouthpiece for Leviathan.{LF}{LF}Despite his protests, a small cult has risen up around him, and you have encouraged him to accept the role and to guide them with compassion and humility.{LF}{LF}His newfound ”Sunken Order” works tirelessly to help new settlers however they can, and to remind people to thank Leviathan for their small fortunes, and Leviathan tells you, both through Vankan's voice and through his brief communions with you, that he is pleased at their efforts.{LF}{LF}As for Vankan himself, he is busier than ever before, but also seems at peace, and still regards you most warmly.
- 怪我からの回復: |>65|?R|万坎为你无需被迫杀死利维坦而感到无比宽慰，于是全身心投入了对神兽的崇拜。他独特的天赋显然使他更容易与神兽沟通，因此万坎既作为你的顾问为你服务，也在必要时充当利维坦的代言人。{LF}{LF}尽管他本人表示反对，但一个小型教团还是围绕他形成了，你鼓励他接受这个角色，以慈悲和谦卑之心引导他们。{LF}{LF}他新成立的“沉没教团”不遗余力地以各种方式帮助新来的定居者，并提醒人们为所得的小小幸运感谢利维坦。利维坦则通过万坎之口，以及与你短暂的沟通告诉你，他对他们的努力感到欣慰。{LF}{LF}至于万坎自己，他比以往任何时候都要忙碌，但似乎也找到了内心的平静，并且依然对你怀有最温暖的敬意。

- Recover from Injury: |>65|?R|Vankan was nearly catatonic with grief after you emerged from the Bath. You spent a lot of time comforting him and helping him work through it, and when you finally concluded that Vankan's third eye had made him particularly sensitive to the divine beast's death, he became suddenly very eager to leave the island.{LF}{LF}He seemed to practically hold his breath for the entire effort of the ship repair, and when you were finally out at sea with the island far behind you, he laid down on the deck and slept peacefully for the first time in weeks.{LF}{LF}Vankan eventually found a place as a healer in a small town with a need of one, his unique gift making him a popular man for setting minds at ease as well as mending bodies. Over time, he has found his visions easier to translate into sensible advice, and he is pleased to finally have found a sense of normalcy.
- 怪我からの回復: |>65|?R|你从浴场出来后，万坎因悲伤而近乎崩溃。你花了很长时间安慰他，帮助他度过难关。当你最终断定是万坎的第三只眼使他对神兽之死特别敏感时，他突然变得非常渴望离开这座岛屿。{LF}{LF}在船只修理的整个过程中，他几乎像是屏住了呼吸。当你们终于驶入大海，将岛屿远远抛在身后时，他在甲板上躺下，几周来第一次安稳地睡着了。{LF}{LF}万坎最终在一个需要治疗师的小镇上找到了归宿，他独特的天赋使他既能治愈身体，也能安抚心灵，因而广受欢迎。随着时间的推移，他发现自己更容易将那些幻视转化为合理的建议，并且为终于找到了一种常态而感到高兴。

- Recover from Injury: |>67|?R|Wisaka was leery of the expedition, knowing that lycanthropes are often hunted and killed in mainland communities, so he ultimately decided to remain on the island.{LF}{LF}Though he considered going to Hayill, he didn't much care for their ongoing struggle with the Knightwood vampires, so he instead headed for Bracewind and hired on at the Pumphouse Brewery.{LF}{LF}Now he plays music for patrons, earning his way in tips, and occasionally taking adventuresome clients of his own.
- 怪我からの回復: |>67|?R|维萨卡对这次远征心存疑虑，他知道狼人在大陆社群中常常遭到猎杀，所以最终决定留在岛上。{LF}{LF}虽然他也考虑过去海伊尔，但对那里与夜林吸血鬼的持续斗争不太感兴趣，于是他转而前往布雷文德，受雇于泵房酿酒厂。{LF}{LF}如今，他为客人们演奏音乐，靠小费谋生，偶尔也接待一些自己找上门的、喜欢冒险的客户。

- Recover from Injury: |>67|?R|Wisaka stayed with you during the conquest of the island, but afterward, when the adventuring gave way to rebuilding and politics, he lost interest.{LF}{LF}He left your company and made way for Hayill in order to be with other lycanthropes, but even that place failed to hold his interest for long.{LF}{LF}Now, you hear people talk from time to time of ”The Howling Bard” who wanders from place to place, meeting new people every day but never content to stay around for long.
- 怪我からの回復: |>67|?R|维萨卡在征服岛屿期间一直与你同行，但后来，当冒险被重建和政治所取代时，他失去了兴趣。{LF}{LF}他离开了你的队伍，动身前往海伊尔，想与其他狼人为伴，但即便是那个地方，也没能长久地吸引住他。{LF}{LF}现在，你时不时会听到人们谈论起一位“嚎叫的吟游诗人”，他四处流浪，每天结识新的人，却从不安于在任何地方久留。

- Recover from Injury: |>68|?R|Whether because of his daring or because of his naivete, Wisaka was enthusiastic about the trip to the mainland, and indeed, when he arrived, he made a spectacle of himself almost immediately.{LF}{LF}Unsure how to react at first, a shocked crowd gathered as Wisaka began to sing and play music, and by the time the guards arrived to see what the commotion was, people were cheering and throwing him spare coins.{LF}{LF}He now has a sort of probationary allowance to live and work in town, and he takes full advantage of it, cheerfully socializing with the locals and frequently answering invitations to perform, as curious crowds from far and wide whisper wild rumours of ”The Howling Bard”.
- 怪我からの回復: |>68|?R|不知是出于胆大还是天真，维萨卡对前往大陆的旅程充满热情，而实际上，他一到那里就几乎立刻成了众人瞩目的焦点。{LF}{LF}起初人们不知所措，当维萨卡开始唱歌演奏时，震惊的人群聚拢过来。等到卫兵赶来查看骚动时，人们已经在欢呼着向他抛掷零钱。{LF}{LF}他现在拥有一种试用期的许可，可以在镇上生活和工作，他充分利用这一点，愉快地与当地人交往，频繁应邀表演。远近而来的好奇人群窃窃私语，流传着关于“嚎叫诗人”的离奇传闻。

- Recover from Injury: |>68|?R|Wisaka seemed to have no place to fit in once the rebuilding started, but for his fondness of you personally, he stuck around anyway. He talked about going to Hayill from time to time, but never actually packed up and left.{LF}{LF}Once you began receiving foreign dignitaries in your stronghold, however, things began to change. Idly plucking away at his lute one day in court, a visiting noblewoman became absolutely enraptured with him. She immediately contracted the construction of a summer home on the island, and she positively insists on organizing eccentric annual festivals that showcase the varied talents of native Lukattites.{LF}{LF}Opinions of these festivals range from inspired to tasteless, but Wisaka features prominently, and he seems thrilled to be widely known and well-regarded.
- 怪我からの回復: |>68|?R|重建开始后，维萨卡似乎无处安身，但由于他个人对你的喜爱，他还是留了下来。他时不时会提到要去海伊尔，但从未真正收拾行李离开。{LF}{LF}然而，当你开始在你的堡垒接待外国使节后，情况开始改变。某天他在宫廷里随意拨弄鲁特琴时，一位来访的贵族妇女完全被他迷住了。她立刻承包了在岛上建造一座避暑别墅的工程，并且十分坚持要组织古怪的年度庆典，以展示本地卢卡特人的各种才华。{LF}{LF}对这些庆典的看法褒贬不一，有的认为富有创意，有的则认为俗不可耐，但维萨卡在其中扮演着重要角色，并且他似乎对自己广为人知且备受赞誉感到欣喜。

- Recover from Injury: |>70|?L|Zantanak cloaked himself in dark cloth and remained your servant and bodyguard once you arrived in Tsarath.{LF}{LF}With his guidance, you were eventually able to find the headquarters of a small cult that you readily impressed into your service.{LF}{LF}He is a constant voice, ever urging you to gather more power, more followers, and more forbidden knowledge.
- 怪我からの回復: |>70|?L|抵达萨拉斯后，赞塔纳克身披深色布袍，继续作为你的仆从和保镖。{LF}{LF}在他的指引下，你最终找到了一个小型邪教组织的总部，并轻松地将其收归麾下。{LF}{LF}他时常在你耳边进言，总是敦促你积聚更多的力量、更多的追随者、以及更多的禁忌知识。

- Recover from Injury: |>70|?L|Zantanak remained by your side faithfully and obediently, serving as your bodyguard and advisor continually, as your pact with him demanded.{LF}{LF}Loathe to wear a disguise, he has taken to dressing in regal fineries and making a show of his advisory role, and he seems to take great pleasure in the startled expressions of visiting politicians.{LF}{LF}
- 怪我からの回復: |>70|?L|赞塔纳克始终忠实地守在你身边，顺从地作为你的保镖和顾问，正如你与他之间的契约所要求的那样。{LF}{LF}他厌恶伪装，转而穿起华丽的王室服饰，并刻意展示其顾问的角色。他似乎非常乐于见到来访政客们那受惊的表情。{LF}{LF}

- Recover from Injury: |>71|?L|As communities grew and your influence continued to expand, Zantanak seemed to have trouble adapting, and one day asked you where he fit into your plans.{LF}{LF}Since his only obligation to you was to serve as your bodyguard and advisor, during your discussion with him, you determined that he would in fact have time to pursue other interests, and almost immediately, he asked you if he would be allowed to take a wife.{LF}{LF}You granted him permission to wed any woman who would have him, and he seemed satisfied.{LF}{LF}Zantanak has not yet chosen a wife, but seems to appreciate the consideration, and as time passes, he seems to settle more and more. He makes friends, saying he is ”establishing contacts” and tours the stronghold to ”maintain visibility” but it is clear that he is beginning to enjoy his time spent amid mortals.
- 怪我からの回復: |>71|?L|随着社区的发展和你影响力的持续扩大，赞塔纳克似乎难以适应。有一天，他问你他在你的计划中处于什么位置。{LF}{LF}由于他对你唯一的义务是担任保镖和顾问，你在与他的讨论中确定，他实际上有时间去追求其他兴趣。他几乎立刻问你，是否允许他娶妻。{LF}{LF}你准许他与任何愿意接受他的女子结婚，他似乎对此感到满意。{LF}{LF}赞塔纳克尚未选定妻子，但似乎很感激这份体谅。随着时间的推移，他显得越来越安定。他结交朋友，说是“建立人脉”，并巡视堡垒以“保持存在感”，但很明显，他开始享受与凡人共处的时光。

- Recover from Injury: |>71|?L|Though he did not relish the idea of covering his face and body, Zantanak put on a low profile once you arrived in Tsarath, and did his best not to cause you undue trouble.{LF}{LF}At his direction, you found the headquarters of a small cult and readily convinced them to serve you, eventually forming a small community where Zantanak hides his face only from outside visitors.{LF}{LF}Eventually, once your commune was well-established, he asked for your permission to take a harem, and seeing that there were several cultists eager to fill the role, you allowed it.{LF}{LF}He is nearly as protective of his wives as he is of you, and he is a much feared, respected, and admired member of your growing faith.
- 怪我からの回復: |>71|?L|尽管不情愿遮掩面容和身体，但抵达萨拉斯后，赞塔纳克还是保持低调，尽力不给你带来不必要的麻烦。{LF}{LF}按照他的指示，你找到了一个小型邪教组织的总部，并轻易说服他们为你效力，最终建立了一个小社区，赞塔纳克只对访客隐藏面容。{LF}{LF}最终，当你们的公社稳固后，他请求你允许他建立一个后宫。你看到有几位邪教徒渴望担当此任，便应允了。{LF}{LF}他保护妻妾们的程度几乎如同保护你一样。在你日益壮大的教派中，他是一位令人畏惧、尊敬且钦佩的成员。

- Recover from Injury: |Byrne returned to Frico's service when you left the island.{LF}{LF}He quietly did as he was told for many years thereafter, bringing Frico many guests, some to meet their fortunes, and others to meet their doom.
- 怪我からの回復: |当你离开岛屿后，伯恩回到了弗里科手下效力。{LF}{LF}此后多年，他默默遵从命令，为弗里科带来了许多客人，其中有些人得以遇见他们的命运，而另一些人则走向了毁灭。

- Recover from Injury: |You are careful to clearly and fairly spell out the new laws of the land, ensuring that fair, elected courts handle criminal issues, and that everything is carefully recorded and reviewed, with punishments commeasurate to crimes and equal treatment for men, orcs, and natives alike. {LF}{LF}Some rankle under these laws, but you work hard to ensure that they are applied as evenly as possible, and most of the people immigrating from the other nations find the adjustment to be quite straightforward. {LF}{LF}Though some would say that you wasted an opportunity to embrace a new, freer way of life, nobody argues that your reign is not fair.
- 怪我からの回復: |你谨慎地制定出清晰公正的新国法，确保由民选的公正法庭处理刑事案件，一切都有详细记录和审查，罚当其罪，且人类、兽人、原住民一律平等。{LF}{LF}虽有人对这些法律不满，但你竭力保证法律执行尽可能公正，大多数来自他国的移民发现适应起来相当顺利。{LF}{LF}或许有人会说，你错失了拥抱更自由新生活的机会，但无人能否认你的统治是公平的。

- Recover from Injury: |You settled in Tsarath quickly, managing to find a quiet place to live somewhere people wouldn't ask a lot of questions.{LF}{LF}Your time spent struggling for survival on the island seemed like a distant nightmare, and the familiar rhythm of calm daily life welcomed you once again.{LF}{LF}
- 怪我からの回復: |你很快就在萨拉思安定下来，找到了一个僻静住处，那儿没人会问东问西。{LF}{LF}岛上挣扎求生的日子恍如隔世，平静日常那熟悉的节奏再次将你包围。{LF}{LF}

- Recover from Injury: |Grant returned to Hayill to share in the celebrations over the death of Frico.{LF}{LF}With the vampire lord vanquished, Hayill quickly became the dominant power on the island, and set up a rogue coalition between the most prominent towns.{LF}{LF}Grant is still there, his heroic deed done, watching the development of the island from the front line.
- 怪我からの回復: |格兰特回到了海伊尔，参加庆祝弗里克死亡的庆典。{LF}{LF}吸血鬼领主被消灭后，海伊尔迅速成为岛上主导力量，并在主要城镇间建立了盗贼同盟。{LF}{LF}格兰特功成身退，仍留在前线，亲眼见证着岛屿的发展。

- Recover from Injury: |Reluctant to fall into the same pattern that resigned so many people to the island in the first place, your application of law is basic, with a small, publicly elected court that oversees only the most severe forms of crime. {LF}{LF}A great deal of autonomy is given to individual communities to carry out justice in the ways they feel best fit their people, and the island is soon divided into counties, each following slightly different models of law, some more resembling those of Crest, some resembling those of Tsarath, and some a unique mixture of both. {LF}{LF}Most immigrants are able to find a community in which they can feel safe and comfortable, and though the mixture of laws can be confusing for some, the island attracts a wide range of interesting and diverse people.
- 怪我からの回復: |你不愿重蹈覆辙——正是旧模式让这么多人困守孤岛，因此法律体系力求精简，仅由民选的小型法庭审理重罪。{LF}{LF}各社区被赋予高度自治权，可按自认最适合的方式执行正义。岛屿很快划分为多个郡，法律模式略有不同：有的类似克雷斯特，有的类似萨拉思，还有的独具特色，融合二者。{LF}{LF}多数移民都能找到令其安心舒适的社区。法律混杂虽令一些人困惑，但岛屿吸引了形形色色的有趣之人。

- Recover from Injury: |Byrne wasn't particularly interested in leaving Lukatt, so when the boat left, he stayed behind.{LF}{LF}He haunts the woodlands of Knightwood still, preying on the wildlife and unsuspecting travelers as it suits him, and relishing his freedom.
- 怪我からの回復: |伯恩对离开卢卡特兴趣寥寥，于是船开走时，他留了下来。{LF}{LF}他依然游荡在奈特伍德的林间，随心所欲地捕食野生动物和毫无戒心的旅人，尽情享受自由。

- Recover from Injury: |The lycanthropes of Hayill petition you early on, recognizing your efforts in ridding them of Frico, and pledging their support for your conquest of the island. {LF}{LF}In return, the Alpha asks only that his people be recognized as people, and that they will be welcomed the same as anyone else. It seems a simple enough request, and your relations with Hayill have been good, so you agree.{LF}{LF}So long as the lycanthropes conduct themselves in a civilized manner, their lycanthropy, in and of itself, will not be an offense, and they will not have to hide from the rest of the island.
- 怪我からの回復: |海伊尔的狼人们早早向你请愿，认可你铲除弗里克的功绩，并誓言支持你征服全岛。{LF}{LF}作为回报，狼王只求族人被承认为人，能像其他人一样被接纳。这要求看似简单，加之你与海伊尔关系良好，你便同意了。{LF}{LF}只要狼人行为文明，狼人身份本身便不构成罪行，他们也无需在岛上躲藏。

- Recover from Injury: |Your experiences on Lukatt made a return to normal civilian life all but impossible, so you ended up joining a mercenary band in order to prevent yourself from becoming too comfortable.{LF}{LF}Though you still managed to keep a small home near a frontier town, you traveled often, and that life suited you better than putting down roots ever had. Your work afforded you an endless variety of interesting new experiences, and life was never boring.{LF}{LF}
- 怪我からの回復: |卢卡特的经历让你难以回归平常百姓生活，最终你加入佣兵团，以免自己过于安逸。{LF}{LF}你在边境小镇附近有个小家，但经常外出奔波。这种生活比安顿下来更合你胃口。工作带来无尽的新鲜体验，人生从不无聊。{LF}{LF}

- Recover from Injury: |With control over Lukatt's seas firmly in your grasp, you are able to send envoys to both the nations of Crest and Tsarath, requesting that they cease their use of the island and recognize your sovereignty. {LF}{LF}Tsarath's King agrees fairly readily, but the King of Crest is not pleased, and he attempts to take Lukatt by force. {LF}{LF}Your mastery of Lukatt's waters, of course, renders his efforts utterly useless. You are able to destroy or seize most of the enemy ships, and Crest quickly agrees to a truce. {LF}{LF}|In a short few years, the island's dangerous monsters have all but disappeared, and Lukatt becomes a bustling hub of trade replete with eager immigrants looking to build and start fresh lives. {LF}{LF}Although many of the island's inhabitants still bear brands upon their necks, in time these marks come to be seen as the marks of pioneers, and not of criminals; people who had, perhaps in the past made mistakes, but who struggled hard to survive and make the most of their setbacks.{LF}{LF}
- 怪我からの回復: |牢牢掌控卢卡特海域后，你向克雷斯特和萨拉思两国派出使节，要求他们停止使用该岛并承认你的主权。{LF}{LF}萨拉思国王爽快同意，但克雷斯特国王大为不满，企图武力夺取卢卡特。{LF}{LF}当然，你对该海域的绝对掌控让他的努力徒劳无功。你摧毁或俘获了大部分敌舰，克雷斯特很快同意休战。{LF}{LF}|短短几年内，岛上的危险怪物几乎绝迹，卢卡特成为繁华的贸易中心，挤满了渴望开创新生活的移民。{LF}{LF}尽管许多岛民颈上仍烙有印记，但久而久之，这些标记被视为开拓者的勋章，而非罪犯的烙印；他们或许曾犯过错，却奋力生存，将挫折化为转机。{LF}{LF}

- Recover from Injury: |Thoroughly unsettled by your encounter with heavy-handed justice, your laws are minimal, and communities are left to mostly fend for themselves.{LF}{LF}The island still has a large criminal population, and is widely seen as a land where the convicted can find a second chance at life. This frontier-style governance scares off many who might otherwise find the island attractive, but it means that your population consists of only the hardiest and the bravest, and your people gain a reputation as such. {LF}{LF}Lukatt makes an exciting destination for would-be adventurers and treasure hunters, eager to delve into the countless ruins where monsters still dwell, and submerge themselves in history, gold, or blood.
- 怪我からの回復: |粗暴的司法制度让你心有余悸，因此岛上法律极为宽松，社区大多只能自谋生路。{LF}{LF}岛上仍有大量罪犯，被广泛视为有前科者能重获新生的地方。这种边疆式的治理吓跑了许多本可能被吸引而来的人，但也意味着你的居民只由最坚韧勇敢的人组成，他们因此赢得了相应的名声。{LF}{LF}卢卡特对渴望探索怪物盘踞的无数遗迹、沉浸于历史、黄金或鲜血中的准冒险家和宝藏猎人来说，是个激动人心的目的地。

- Recover from Injury: |In the morning, Bato pulls you aside. {LF}{LF}”Got a sec?” he asks.{LF}{LF}”
- 怪我からの回復: |清晨，巴托把你拉到一边。{LF}{LF}“有空吗？”他问道。{LF}{LF}"

- Recover from Injury: |In the morning, Bato is in much better shape. {LF}{LF}”Thanks again,” he says. ”That's twice now you saved my life. You make a habit of this, and I'll have a hard time paying you back! I've had a thought, though.{LF}{LF}
- 怪我からの回復: |早晨，巴托的状态好多了。{LF}{LF}“再次感谢，”他说，"这已经是你第二次救我了。你要老这么干，我可就难报答你了！不过，我有个想法。{LF}{LF}

- Recover from Injury: |As you begin taking more and more territory across the island, Frico becomes aggressive, and tries to have you assassinated. {LF}{LF}Your fortune, however, holds fast, and the attempt fails. Eventually, seeing no other choice, you mount a full assault on Frico's castle, and he is killed by your soldiers.{LF}{LF}For all of his posturing and politicking, the castle holds surprisingly little of worth, revealing the vampire to be little more than a bored corpse playing at grandeur. The place is seized by your people and converted into one of your strongholds.
- 怪我からの回復: |随着你在岛上占领越来越多的领土，弗里科变得咄咄逼人，试图派人暗杀你。{LF}{LF}然而你福大命大，暗杀未能得逞。最终，别无选择的你对弗里科的城堡发动了全面进攻，他死于你的士兵之手。{LF}{LF}尽管他装腔作势、玩弄权术，城堡里却出奇地没什么值钱东西，暴露出这个吸血鬼不过是个装腔作势的无聊尸体。此地被你的部下占领，并改建为你的一个据点。

- Recover from Injury: |When you arrive, you find
- 怪我からの回復: |抵达时，你发现

- Recover from Injury: |When you arrive, you find Zantanak and the others, and he seems unsurprised. ”Welcome back, Master,” he says, bowing. ”As you can see, most of your soldiers have survived. Some are injured, but it is nothing serious.”{LF}{LF}”The creature that did this was Leviathan. I knew of his presence here, but thought it unlikely that he would interfere with your escape. It is most curious.”{LF}{LF}You share your account of the strange temple you found in the grotto, and Zantanak nods his head in understanding.{LF}{LF}”Yes, it would stand to reason that the ancient Lukattites worshipped Leviathan as a kind of God. He is undoubtedly a being of tremendous power, and obviously is aware of our movements, but the question remains as to why he would interfere. I do not have the answers.”{LF}{LF}
- 怪我からの回復: |抵达时，你找到了赞塔纳克和其他人，他似乎并不意外。“主人，欢迎回来，”他鞠躬说道。“如您所见，您的大部分士兵都幸存了下来。有些人受伤了，但都不严重。”{LF}{LF}“造成这一切的是利维坦。我知道他在这里，但以为他不太可能干涉你们逃脱。这非常奇怪。”{LF}{LF}你讲述了在洞穴中发现的那座奇异神庙的经历，赞塔纳克会意地点了点头。{LF}{LF}“是的，古代卢卡特人将利维坦奉若神明是合乎情理的。他无疑是拥有巨大力量的存在，并且显然知晓我们的动向，但问题依然在于他为何要干涉。我无法解答。”{LF}{LF}

- Recover from Injury: |By the time the night yields to morning, the only person who hasn't turned up is Logus. You and a few of the others search the beach by daylight, but there is no sign of him at all.{LF}{LF}”He's probably drowned,”
- 怪我からの回復: |待到夜幕褪去，黎明降临，唯一没有现身的人只剩下洛格斯。你和另外几个人在白天搜索了海滩，但完全没有他的踪迹。{LF}{LF}“他大概是淹死了，”

- Recover from Injury: |Disgusted with your broken promise, Grant left your company as soon as you made it clear that you would be leaving the island.{LF}{LF}Rather than face the shame of returning to Hayill empty-handed, Grant gathered up a few of his werewolf friends and staged an assault of his own on Frico's castle.{LF}{LF}Many on both sides were slain, including Grant himself, but Frico survived, and declared open war on the island's lycanthropes.{LF}{LF}The Knightwood region is now a deadly warzone, with fangs and claws lashing out from behind every shadow, and until one side is exterminated, it seems likely to stay that way.
- 怪我からの回復: |因你违背承诺而感到厌恶，格兰特在你明确表示将离开岛屿后，便立刻离开了你的队伍。{LF}{LF}与其两手空空、蒙羞返回海伊尔，格兰特召集了几位狼人朋友，独自对弗里科的城堡发动了袭击。{LF}{LF}双方都有许多人阵亡，包括格兰特本人，但弗里科幸存了下来，并公开向岛上的狼人族群宣战。{LF}{LF}夜木地区如今成了致命的战场，獠牙与利爪从每个阴影后袭来，在一方被彻底消灭之前，这种局面似乎将持续下去。

- Recover from Injury: Peering into the bars through a wild shock of hair is the wry face of a young orc. He begins to work the lock open quietly.{LF}{LF}”Name's Kirilo. I escaped a while back, but I saw the boat come in, and... well I remember sitting in one of these cells myself, just wishing someone would come and help.”{LF}{LF}The lock quietly snaps open and the door goes slack. Kirilo, barefoot and dressed in scant more than tatters and a ragged cloak, pushes it open and motions you out into the hall.{LF}{LF}”Now the fun starts. You got any tricks up your sleeve I should know about?”
- 怪我からの回復: 透过一团蓬乱的头发向铁栏外窥视，是一张年轻兽人扭曲的脸。他开始悄悄地撬锁。{LF}{LF}“我叫基里洛。我之前逃了出来，但我看到船进港了，然后……嗯，我记得我自己也曾坐在这样的牢房里，只盼着有人能来帮忙。”{LF}{LF}锁悄无声息地弹开，门松动了。赤着脚、衣衫褴褛仅披着一件破斗篷的基里洛推开门，示意你到走廊去。{LF}{LF}“现在好戏开始了。你袖子里藏着什么我该知道的把戏吗？”
